data.title: Anumana adds Kevin Ballinger and Jean-Luc Butel to Board of Directors in Cambridge, Mass.
data.description: Anumana, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, recently appointed Kevin Ballinger and Jean-Luc Butel to its Board of Directors.

data.title: NTA introduces energy-efficient valve solutions to meet rising demands for speed, cost control, and sustainability in automation.
data.description: In Ningbo, China, on January 12, 2026, it was reported that pneumatic components are extensively utilized in factories due to their simplicity and dependability. With increasing needs for efficiency, cost management, and eco-friendliness, manufacturers are reevaluating the energy consumption of these systems. This change reflects the growing emphasis on optimizing energy usage in industrial settings.

data.title: HawkEye 360 launches Cluster 13 with 3 satellites, establishes initial communications. #SignalsIntelligence #Analytics
data.description: In Herndon, Virginia, on January 12, 2026, HawkEye 360, an esteemed provider of signals intelligence data and analytics worldwide, reported the triumphant deployment of its newest set of satellites known as Cluster 13. The company also verified the establishment of preliminary contact with the satellites post-launch. Cluster 13 comprises a trio of satellites, which were seamlessly integrated into orbit as part of this development.

data.title: ebm-papst Inc. displays air & heating tech at AHR Expo 2026, Booth C7325 in Las Vegas from Feb 2–4. Theme: "Today. Tomorrow. Beyond."
data.description: In Farmington, Connecticut, on January 12, 2026, ebm-papst Inc. announced that they will showcase their newest air movement, heating, and cooling technologies at AHR Expo 2026 in Las Vegas, Nevada. The exhibition will take place from February 2 to February 4, 2026, at Booth C7325. The company's innovations will be presented under the theme "Today. Tomorrow. Beyond."

data.title: B-FLEXION Life Sciences set to acquire remaining 57% stake in Radius Health after years of growth. Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: After experiencing three years of rapid expansion and profitable performance under the ownership of B‑FLEXION and Patient Square, Radius Health has been acquired. The transaction took place in Boston on January 12, 2026. Radius Health, a specialized biopharmaceutical company focusing on bone health and related issues, has achieved significant growth during this period.

data.title: Gécamines buys 100,000 tons of TFM's 2026 copper, marking the first direct purchase post-market consultation.
data.description: In Kinshasa, the Democratic Republic of Congo, as of January 12, 2026, Gécamines has announced its decision to acquire 100,000 tons of copper production from Tenke Fungurume (TFM) for the year 2026. This agreement, resulting from a market consultation conducted in late 2025, marks the initial direct procurement transaction between the two entities.

data.title: Coinbase may withdraw support for a crypto market-structure bill due to potential restrictions on stablecoin rewards.
data.description: Coinbase, a notable cryptocurrency platform traded on NASDAQ under the ticker COIN, has cautioned U.S. lawmakers that it may cease backing a significant crypto market-related bill if alterations hinder its capacity to provide incentives for stablecoin investments. The bill is set for consideration in a Senate committee this week; however, revised clauses would confine stablecoin incentives exclusively to regulated banks or trust-chartered entities. Reports indicate that this initiative, supported by the banking sector, faces opposition from crypto-centric companies. For Coinbase, rewards generated from stablecoins represent a crucial revenue stream, closely connected... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 1 in 4 refund dollars deemed abusive by Riskified analysis; new "Dynamic Returns" feature introduced to protect revenue and improve customer satisfaction.
data.description: In New York, a recent Riskified analysis unveiled that 25% of refund dollars are deemed abusive. To combat this issue, the company has introduced Dynamic Returns, a Policy Protect feature designed to protect revenue and enhance customer experience.

data.title: Senzing AI for entity resolution now in AWS Marketplace for risk & fraud detection and KYC; offers easy access to pre-built AI tools.
data.description: A company called Senzing recently introduced Senzing® AI for entity resolution on AWS Marketplace, offering organizations access to advanced entity resolution AI technology. This allows businesses to efficiently explore, evaluate, test, purchase, implement, and oversee numerous software solutions, such as pre-made AI agents and integration tools, all within a single platform. Senzing's entity resolution is provided in SDK format, enabling organizations to easily and swiftly deploy real-time or batch entity resolution processes.

data.title: Manas AI gains edge with partnership with Schrödinger, Inc., accessing physics-based platform for molecular discovery.
data.description: Manas AI, a comprehensive AI-based drug discovery and development firm, disclosed a new strategic partnership with Schrödinger, Inc. The deal provides Manas AI with substantial utilization of Schrödinger’s cutting-edge physics-based computational platform, propelling Manas AI to the forefront of AI-powered molecular research. Through this agreement, Manas AI aims to establish a pioneering physics-based atomic "world model" that is projected to serve as an AI-powered guide for drug discovery.

data.title: Miro launches AI Workflows to speed up innovation cycle, cutting delivery time and cost for enterprise teams.
data.description: In San Francisco and Amsterdam, Miro® has introduced AI Workflows for businesses to enhance the process of developing ideas into final products. This new feature allows enterprise groups to create, personalize, and distribute collaborative AI workflows that automate entire processes on Miro’s platform. Companies utilizing AI Workflows have experienced a significant decrease in innovation cycle duration from weeks to hours, resulting in reduced total delivery time and cost savings.

data.title: BGC Group to report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 12, 2026 in New York.
data.description: Financial services company BGC Group will be announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 12, 2026. This announcement will provide key insights into the company's performance over the last quarter, including important figures such as revenue, profit, and potentially any strategic plans moving forward. Investors and analysts will be keen on reviewing these numbers to assess the company's financial health and future prospects.

data.title: Aspen Power receives $200M from Deutsche Bank for clean energy development, boosting growth and nationwide expansion.
data.description: A prominent distributed generation platform called Aspen Power, supported by Carlyle and focused on advancing clean energy, has recently completed a significant financial milestone. Deutsche Bank has contributed $200 million through a capital raise to aid Aspen Power's expansion efforts. This influx of funds will enhance Aspen Power's financial capabilities and facilitate various growth strategies, such as advancing development projects, engaging with vendors, and deploying new projects on a national scale. This financing from Deutsche Bank is crucial in positioning Aspen Power for continued success.

data.title: New book in Austin challenges profit-first mindset with focus on integrity, collaboration, human-centered design for sustainable growth.
data.description: A new book released in Austin, Texas on January 12, 2026, challenges the prevailing mindset of prioritizing profits and offers a fresh approach for sustainable growth. Amidst concerns of declining trust in institutions, climate-related risks, and ethical dilemmas surrounding artificial intelligence, the author advocates for a shift in operating logic. This new perspective aims to address these challenges while promoting long-term sustainability. The book presents innovative ideas to guide leaders in navigating complex issues, emphasizing the need to move beyond profit-centric thinking.
